codeReview.summary: The fix commit fully addresses the prior scrutiny failures without introducing regressions in the reviewed paths: update() now rejects non-object patches before json_patch, iso8601_to_epoch_ms() now rejects invalid calendar dates with month-aware/leap-year-aware validation, and query_between() now returns an empty result for from >= to. Added tests directly cover all three fixes.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-worker skill requires RED-first test additions, but this fix session still applied implementation edits before adding the new fix tests while handoff.skillFeedback marked followedProcedure=true. This indicates a procedure-enforcement gap in the skill/handoff process.
